brand_identity.name: MHS-ScaleOps
brand_identity.positioning: I build expert-led online training businesses at zero upfront cost. I only get paid when you make money.

headings.usage: Use Outfit Black (900) for hero/major impact, Light (300) for elegant contrast subheadings. Apply tracking-tight or tracking-tighter to all headings > 32px.

body.usage: Use Manrope Regular/Medium for dense body text, FAQs, and labels. Apply leading-relaxed.

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous spacing. p-12 to p-32 for section padding. Asymmetric alignments. Avoid centered layouts unless for specific contrast.
spacing_and_layout.grid_system: Bento Grid strategy for featured content. Use gap-6 or gap-8.

navbar.classes: fixed top-0 w-full z-50 backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#050505]/70 border-b border-slate-800

hero.visuals: Dark architectural offset image layered with heavy text.

ctas.primary: Solid Amber bg-[#f59e0b] text-black hover:bg-[#d97706] rounded-sm px-8 py-4 font-semibold text-lg transition-transform hover:-translate-y-1
ctas.secondary: Outline Teal border border-[#14b8a6] text-[#14b8a6] hover:bg-[#14b8a6]/10 rounded-sm px-8 py-4 font-semibold text-lg transition-colors

cards.classes: bg-[#0f1115] border border-slate-800 p-8 rounded-none transition-all duration-300 hover:border-[#14b8a6]/50 hover:shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(20,184,166,0.1)]
cards.usage: Use for the 12 Deliverables in 'The Offer' section.

timeline_stepper.usage: Use for 'How It Works' (3-phase commission model) and 'Process' (30-day roadmap).

niche_chips.classes: px-6 py-3 rounded-full border border-slate-800 bg-slate-900/50 text-slate-300 text-sm tracking-wide font-medium

accordion.usage: Shadcn UI Accordion for FAQs. Style with border-b border-slate-800, no cards.

images.description: Intricate geometric design in modern architecture with light and shadow play. Use as hero right-side offset image or atmospheric background.
Abstract golden metallic curves on black background. Use as subtle 5-10% opacity overlay in specific sections like Founder or Offer.
Professional corporate portrait of a bearded man in suit and eyeglasses. Use as placeholder for Muhammad Hassan Shafiq.
Black flat screen computer monitor in dark setting. Represents data/analytics success for Naixol.

motion_and_interaction.hover_states: All cards and buttons must have clear hover transitions. Buttons: translate-y, bg-color shift. Cards: subtle border color shift to teal.
motion_and_interaction.scroll_reveal: Implement Framer Motion staggered reveals on scroll (opacity 0 to 1, y: 20 to 0).
motion_and_interaction.marquee: Consider a slow-moving marquee for the niches or deliverable keywords if a purely static layout feels too rigid, using text-slate-800/50 outline text.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure all text meets WCAG AA standard against #050505 background.
accessibility_and_testing.test_ids: Mandatory data-testid attributes on all buttons, links, accordion triggers, and form elements (e.g., data-testid='hero-calendly-btn', data-testid='faq-trigger-1').

instructions_to_main_agent: Install 'lucide-react' for icons. Use Phosphor Icons (@phosphor-icons/react) if higher-end duotone icons are needed.
Do not use generic 'Inter' or 'Space Grotesk' fonts. Import 'Outfit' and 'Manrope' from Google Fonts and configure them in tailwind.config.js.
Use standard HTML/Tailwind for structural layout (grids, hero, footers). Use Shadcn UI ONLY for complex interactive elements like Accordions.
Embed Calendly in the Final CTA section via iframe or react-calendly.
For the Jotform link, render it as a button (href) as per requirements (not an iframe).
Do not invent new colors. Stick strictly to the slate-950/050505 dark theme, Amber (#f59e0b) for primary actions, and Teal (#14b8a6) for accents.
